name: None Such Prize Cookies
recipeInstructions: Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda. Cream the shortening; gradually add sugar until fluffy. Add eggs; beat until smooth. Add minced meat in small pieces. Mix in the flour thoroughly. Drop by teaspoonfuls, 2 inches apart, onto a greased baking sheet. Bake in a moderately hot oven (400°F) for about 12 minutes. Makes about 48 cookies.
